goal: 实现 #88 Answer-facet dogfood gate v1

summary.title: 支持 dogfood answer facets
summary.what: 为私有 dogfood acceptance flow 增加 expected.answerFacets、facet/assertion 分离评分、失败分类、runner/README/scorecard 输出，以及 passing/failing facet 测试覆盖。
summary.why: #88 要求 dogfood case 不只验证 session/cwd/snippet，还要能验证检索到的 evidence 是否支撑真实回答 facets，并把 failure 归类成可行动的问题层级。
summary.user_goal: 实现 #88 Answer-facet dogfood gate v1

decisions.chose: 在 expected.answerFacets 下加入 label、mustContain、可选 failureClass
decisions.rationale: answer facet 是对 retrieved evidence 的预期，不是 find option；放在 expected 可与现有 session/cwd/context assertions 共存。

decisions.point: facet 和既有断言如何评分
decisions.chose: DogfoodEvaluation 增加 assertionMark、facetMark、failureClasses，同时保留总 mark/blocking
decisions.rationale: runner 可分别报告 facet pass/fail 和 session/cwd/match/context assertions，同时 hard/candidate gate 仍使用总体 mark。

decisions.chose: 新增枚举 coverage_index、skill_guidance、cli_recall_ranking_context、stale_golden、unclear_case，并附在失败 predicate/facet 上
decisions.rationale: #88 需要失败能落到可行动层级；默认 recall/context 问题归 cli_recall_ranking_context，无命中归 coverage_index，facet 可显式覆盖。

decisions.chose: runner read-range 对 matchSeq 缺失的 hit 使用 --query 回退，并使用 sessionRef 读跨 source session
decisions.rationale: answer facets 必须绑定真实 evidence；session-level hits 不能因为缺 seq 而跳过上下文读取。

decisions.chose: 抽出 buildDogfoodScoreboard，并让 README predicate 输出显示 answer_facet:<facet label>
decisions.rationale: 独立 Standards review 指出 scoreboard 重复和 answer_facet.answer_facet 可读性差；已修。

rejected.alternative: 只复用 context.mustContain 表达答案 facet
rejected.reason: 无法把 answer-level facet pass/fail 与 session/cwd/match assertions 分开报告。

rejected.alternative: 让所有 facet failure 默认阻断
rejected.reason: 项目 dogfood 约定 candidate failure 非阻断，hard failure 才阻断；本改动保留该 gate 语义。

review_notes: 验证通过：npx tsc --noEmit；npx vitest run eval/dogfood-eval-core.test.ts eval/acceptance-gate.test.ts；npm --silent run eval:acceptance；fixture SHLOG_DATA_DIR dogfood runner smoke；npm run check；git diff --check。
独立 Spec review 无 findings。独立 Standards review 无硬违规，指出两个 smell；已修复。
perf-bench 的 dogfood scoreboard parser 同步读取 assertion/facet counters，避免 #87 baseline report 丢失 #88 新指标。
controller 直接执行了 implementation-slice 作为本轮推进例外；已用独立 review 子代理补偿。后续若 thread launcher 可用，优先 worker session。

architectural_claims: Dogfood expected answer facets are evidence-level assertions grouped separately from session/cwd/match/context assertions.
Dogfood scoreboard is shared through buildDogfoodScoreboard so runner and acceptance gate count facet/assertion outcomes consistently.
behavioral_changes: Dogfood evaluation returns assertionMark, facetMark, and failureClasses.
Dogfood runner README and scorecard include assertion/facet pass-fail counters and failure class output.
Candidate failures remain non-blocking; hard failures still set hardFail and nonzero runner exit.
Runner read-range now supports session-level hits via --query and uses source-qualified sessionRef for read commands.
Acceptance gate includes a passing answer facet fixture; core tests include passing and failing facet cases.

api_changes.signature: Dogfood evaluation/scorecard JSON includes assertionMark, facetMark, failureClasses, assertion/facet counters

security_implications: No transcript content is added to committed fixtures beyond existing synthetic eval data; private dogfood artifacts remain under ignored data/.
migration_notes: Existing dogfood JSONL remains valid; answerFacets is optional.
